title: Laughing Stock
description: A modpack made to optimize Minecraft to it's greatest limits with also adding features that makes Minecraft more realistic. With first person, chat filters, and more. This modpack tries it's best to make your game way more unique.
body:
A modpack made to optimize Minecraft to it's greatest limits with also adding features that makes Minecraft more realistic. With first person, chat filters, and more. This modpack tries it's best to make your game way more unique. This modpack can be played on low quality computers and is made to optimize and make it even more fun.

All versions work correctly as long as you do not install any other mods. Just make sure that those mods will function once you install them into this Modpack.
